name: Tomato and farfalle pasta salad
intro: This is a simple, fresh salad that can be whipped up in minutes if you have leftover pasta on hand. It is perfect for children, and is endlessly adaptable—try adding peppers, red onion, or cooked zucchini.

ingredients.item: handful of fresh flat-leaf parsley, finely chopped
handful of fresh basil leaves, torn
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Cook the pasta in a pot of boiling salted water for 10 minutes, or until al dente. Drain, and return to the pot.
Coarsely chop the tomatoes and add to the pasta along with the parsley, basil leaves, and garlic. Season with salt and black pepper, and toss with some olive oil to coat before serving.
